text: Computer vision is a field of artificial intelligence that enables computers to understand and process visual information from the world. Image recognition allows computers to identify objects, people, or scenes in photos and videos. Object detection goes further by locating specific items, such as cars or pedestrians, within an image. This technology has many practical applications, from facial recognition in smartphones to quality control in factories. One of the most exciting uses is in self-driving cars, where computer vision helps vehicles detect road signs, obstacles, and other cars in real time. As this technology improves, it will continue to transform industries and daily life.
